property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerShell_7.6.1.0_x64__8wekyb3d8bbwe;c:\Users\ajayr\AppData\Roaming\Code - Insiders\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\ajayr\AppData\Roaming\Code - Insiders\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.11.10-hotspot in;C:\app\ajayr\product\21c\dbhomeXE in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;"C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.1 in;";C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.1 in;C:\Flex Windows\EditPlusPortable;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\IVI Foundation\VISA\WinNT\Bin\;C:\Program Files\IVI Foundation\VISA\Win64\Bin\;C:\Program Files (x86)\IVI Foundation\IVI\Bin\;C:\Program Files\IVI Foundation\IVI\Bin\;C:\Program Files (x86)\IVI Foundation\VISA\WinNT\Bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11 in in\;E:\Softwares\jdk-21_windows-x64_bin\jdk-21.0.11 in;C:\Program Files

testcase.name: Get all booking IDs
testcase.system-out: @booking @smoke @positive Scenario: Get all booking IDs # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:14 15:41:47.117 [main] INFO com.booker.utils.RestAssuredSetup - RestAssured initialized with base URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com 15:41:47.143 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Get all booking IDs [PASSED] === 15:41:47.155 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:41:51.945 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 28bb8**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: GET Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> When I send a GET request to "/booking" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iSendGETRequest(java.lang.String) 15:41:53.552 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) 15:41:53.645 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Retrieved 403 booking(s) And the response should return a list of booking IDs # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theResponseShouldReturnAListOfBookingIds() 15:41:53.650 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Get all booking IDs ===

testcase.name: Get bookings filtered by first name
testcase.system-out: @booking @positive Scenario: Get bookings filtered by first name # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:20 15:41:53.665 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Get bookings filtered by first name [PASSED] === 15:41:53.666 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:41:55.492 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: ba35e**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: GET Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking?firstname=Jim Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: firstname=Jim Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> When I send a GET request to "/booking" with query param "firstname" as "Jim" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iSendGETRequestWithQueryParam(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) 15:41:56.930 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) 15:41:56.934 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Retrieved 3 booking(s) And the response should return a list of booking IDs # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theResponseShouldReturnAListOfBookingIds() 15:41:56.937 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Get bookings filtered by first name ===

testcase.name: Get bookings filtered by check-in date
testcase.system-out: @booking @positive Scenario: Get bookings filtered by check-in date # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:26 15:41:56.957 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Get bookings filtered by check-in date [PASSED] === 15:41:56.959 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:41:58.491 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 27a51**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: GET Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking?checkin=2024-01-01 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: checkin=2024-01-01 Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> When I send a GET request to "/booking" with query param "checkin" as "2024-01-01" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iSendGETRequestWithQueryParam(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) 15:41:59.958 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) 15:41:59.963 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Retrieved 10 booking(s) And the response should return a list of booking IDs # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theResponseShouldReturnAListOfBookingIds() 15:41:59.966 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Get bookings filtered by check-in date ===

testcase.name: Get a specific booking by ID
testcase.system-out: @booking @smoke @positive Scenario: Get a specific booking by ID # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:34 15:41:59.984 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Get a specific booking by ID [PASSED] === 15:41:59.987 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:01.557 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: ed6c0**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "James", "lastname": "Brown", "totalprice": 150, "depositpaid": true, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-01-01", "checkout": "2025-01-07" }, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast" } 15:42:03.101 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Created test booking with ID: 654 Given a booking exists # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.aBookingExists() Request method: GET Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/654 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> When I send a GET request to the booking # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iSendGETRequestForBookingByIdFromContext() 15:42:04.641 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) And the booking response should have "firstname" as "James" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theBookingResponseShouldHaveFieldAs(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the booking response should have "lastname" as "Brown" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theBookingResponseShouldHaveFieldAs(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) 15:42:04.690 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Get a specific booking by ID ===

testcase.name: Get booking with non-existent ID

error.message: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because the return value of "com.booker.utils.ScenarioContext.getLastResponse()" is null

testcase.error: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because the return value of "com.booker.utils.ScenarioContext.getLastResponse()" is null at com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(AuthSteps.java:87) at ✽.the response status code should be 404(file:///E:/Softwares/restful-booker-automation/restful-booker-automation/src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:44)
testcase.system-out:
@booking @negative Scenario: Get booking with non-existent ID # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:42 15:42:04.707 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Get booking with non-existent ID [PASSED] === 15:42:04.710 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:06.325 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 39c49**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Then the response status code should be 404 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "io.restassured.response.Response.getStatusCode()" because the return value of "com.booker.utils.ScenarioContext.getLastResponse()" is null at com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(AuthSteps.java:87) at ✽.the response status code should be 404(file:///E:/Softwares/restful-booker-automation/restful-booker-automation/src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:44)
15:42:06.355 [main] ERROR com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === FAILED Scenario: Get booking with non-existent ID ===

testcase.name: Create a new booking with all fields
testcase.system-out: @booking @smoke @positive Scenario: Create a new booking with all fields # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:49 15:42:06.396 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Create a new booking with all fields [PASSED] === 15:42:06.399 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:08.069 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 49b50**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "James", "lastname": "Brown", "totalprice": 150, "depositpaid": true, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-01-01", "checkout": "2025-01-07" }, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast" } 15:42:09.556 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Created booking with ID: 705 When I create a booking with the following details: # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iCreateABookingWithDetails(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) | firstname | James | | lastname | Brown | | totalprice | 150 | | depositpaid | true | | checkin | 2025-01-01 | | checkout | 2025-01-07 | | additionalneeds | Breakfast | 15:42:09.563 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) And the response should contain a booking ID # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theResponseShouldContainABookingId() 15:42:09.602 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Firstname verified: James And the booking firstname should be "James" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theBookingFirstnameShouldBe(java.lang.String) And the booking lastname should be "Brown" # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theBookingLastnameShouldBe(java.lang.String) 15:42:09.628 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Create a new booking with all fields ===

testcase.name: Create a booking without additional needs
testcase.system-out: @booking @positive Scenario: Create a booking without additional needs # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:64 15:42:09.636 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Create a booking without additional needs [PASSED] === 15:42:09.637 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:11.142 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 34bde**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "Alice", "lastname": "Smith", "totalprice": 200, "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-03-01", "checkout": "2025-03-05" }, "additionalneeds": null } 15:42:12.767 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Created booking with ID: 730 When I create a booking with the following details: # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iCreateABookingWithDetails(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) | firstname | Alice | | lastname | Smith | | totalprice | 200 | | depositpaid | false | | checkin | 2025-03-01 | | checkout | 2025-03-05 | | additionalneeds | [empty] | 15:42:12.770 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 200, Actual status: 200 Then the response status code should be 200 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) And the response should contain a booking ID # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.theResponseShouldContainABookingId() 15:42:12.794 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Create a booking without additional needs ===

testcase.name: Create booking with missing required fields
testcase.system-out: @booking @negative Scenario: Create booking with missing required fields # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:77 15:42:12.810 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Create booking with missing required fields [PASSED] === 15:42:12.812 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:14.361 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: 651a1**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "John" } When I send an invalid POST request to "/booking" with body: # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.iSendInvalidPostRequest(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) 15:42:16.131 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps - Expected status: 500, Actual status: 500 Then the response status code should be 500 # com.booker.stepdefs.AuthSteps.theResponseStatusCodeShouldBe(int) 15:42:16.133 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === PASSED Scenario: Create booking with missing required fields ===

testcase.name: Update an existing booking fully
testcase.system-out: @booking @positive Scenario: Update an existing booking fully # src/test/resources/features/booking.feature:89 15:42:16.150 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.Hooks - === Starting Scenario: Update an existing booking fully [PASSED] === 15:42:16.151 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Base URL configured: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com Given the API base URL is configured # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.theApiBaseUrlIsConfigured() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "username": "admin", "password": "password123" } 15:42:17.755 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps - Authenticated. Token acquired: ad48c**** And I am authenticated with valid credentials # com.booker.stepdefs.CommonSteps.iAmAuthenticatedWithValidCredentials() Request method: POST Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "James", "lastname": "Brown", "totalprice": 150, "depositpaid": true, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-01-01", "checkout": "2025-01-07" }, "additionalneeds": "Breakfast" } 15:42:19.282 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps - Created test booking with ID: 792 Given a booking exists # com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps.aBookingExists() Request method: PUT Request URI: https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking/792 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json Cookie=token=ad48c17a9b55b98 Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "Updated", "lastname": "Name", "totalprice": 300, "depositpaid": true, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-06-01", "checkout": "2025-06-10" }, "additionalneeds": "Lunch" } 15:42:20.929 [main] INFO com.booker.stepdefs.BookingSteps -
